summary: Completed testing of banbansports UNDERGROUND HD iteration 3 bug fixes. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend has critical JavaScript runtime errors preventing proper functionality testing. Code analysis shows claimed fixes are implemented in source but not executing due to runtime errors.

ui_bugs.issue: Webpack dev server error overlay blocking UI interactions and preventing JavaScript execution
Runtime errors showing 'switchServer is not defined' and 'filterLeague is not defined' despite functions being bound to window scope in source code

integration_issues.issue: 0 sponsor images found in DOM despite 15 images defined in HTML source with Google Favicons API
Cannot test channel switching functionality due to JavaScript runtime errors
Cannot test video controls due to JavaScript runtime errors blocking interactions

passed_tests: Backend API /api/ returns success with message and version 2.0
Backend API /api/scores/live returns live score data (TÜRKİYE vs ROMANYA)
Backend API /api/channels returns all 14 channels with proper status
Backend API /api/stream/health returns ok:true for test stream URL
Frontend page loads with banbansports logo visible
Match center shows 7 league filter buttons (TÜMÜ, SÜPER LİG, ŞAMPİYONLAR LİGİ, SERİE A, BUNDESLIGA, LA LİGA, PREMİER LİG)
HTML source code analysis confirms Google Favicons API implementation (15 sponsor images using google.com/s2/favicons)
HTML source code analysis confirms switchServer function bound to window scope (line 1054-1060)
HTML source code analysis confirms filterLeague function bound to window scope (line 1527)
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix JavaScript runtime errors preventing code execution. The claimed bug fixes are implemented in source code but not executing due to webpack dev server errors and runtime issues. Need to resolve JavaScript execution environment to verify actual functionality.
